Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you in good spirits and health.

It is indeed a pleasure to receive your email regarding the potential investment opportunity presented by your esteemed self, as the Finance Director of Syrian Petroleum Company (SPC). Understanding the complexities of the current political landscape in Syria, I can appreciate your urgency to secure and diversify your assets internationally.

I am very interested in learning more about your investment strategy and the capital you are looking to allocate towards ventures in my country. Moreover, I would love to offer my insights and collaborate to ensure that any investment you make here is not only viable but also profitable in the long term.

My country offers a myriad of opportunities in various sectors, such as technology, real estate, renewable energy, healthcare, and food services, to name a few. However, to provide a more tailored suggestion, it might be beneficial for us to discuss the level of involvement you wish to have in the investment, the risk profile you are comfortable with, and any specific sectors you might already have in mind.

It is imperative for us to establish a foundation of trust and due diligence from the onset. With that in mind, I would propose we set up a more secure and direct form of communication, perhaps through a voice or video call, or possibly a face-to-face meeting, should that be feasible. In your next correspondence, if you could provide me with more information about your company, your investment criteria, and any necessary credentials, it would greatly help us move forward with this promising partnership.

Looking forward to hearing back from you and exploring this venture further.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Faiez:

Dear Cameron,

Thank you for your email response with hope this message will meet you well today. Firstly, I'd like to assure you that this is a genuine request and that these investment opportunities and the funds allocated are 100% legal and legitimate ventures and all requirements will be met in accordance with your country's law and regulations.

I am interested in investing in your country as well as setting up a private investment cooperation with you most especially in the areas where you have some experience. Due to the precarious / uncertain political, economic and social situation in Syria at the moment, it will please me to transfer my funds to you on agreement that you will have the funds invested judiciously with excellent Return on Investment (ROI). The funds were acquired through my personal oil dealings as the Financial Director of the Syrian General Petroleum Group (GPC).

I would like to clarify my ideas for both of our benefits so that we can put a proper plan in place. Time is also very important because of the constant changes in our situation here. Please advise me on the areas in which you are competent to partner in investment in your country or in your area of influence.

The targeted volume of investments is US$98 Million which is clean and accessible. I am interested in long term investments that will guarantee both of us a steady return in income annually.

Ideally, I would also suggest we look into the following areas:

1. Natural Resources
2. Agriculture Sector
3. Real Estate/Residential
4. Renewable Energy
5. Haulage/Logistics


However I will depend on your advice because you are more knowledgeable about the best areas to invest in your country. I am also interested, importantly, in the laws that control partnerships with foreign investors, although I would like to be a silent partner.

I look forward to your detailed response and I hope we can establish a profitable long term partnership based on mutual trust as we proceed with this first and important stage of getting to know each other better. Upon your response, I will share my Government issued International passport as proof of Identification so you can be assured of who you are dealing with.

Your response will be appreciated.

Regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
Damascus Syria.

Email #3, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I am truly humbled by your trust in reaching out to me for such a significant financial venture, and I am pleased to hear about your commitment to legality and due diligence in the investment process. Your comprehensive list of target areas for investment aligns well with some of the fastest-growing sectors in my country.

It is my goal to ensure that our potential partnership will be both fruitful and transparent. With a keen interest in long-term investment prospects and with a focus on sectors such as renewable energy and technology, which are currently thriving here, I believe we can find numerous opportunities that offer the steady annual returns you are seeking.

Your proposal of putting together a plan that benefits both parties is reassuring, and I would advise that we look into the legal framework for foreign investment in more detail. As you requested, I will compile information on the laws and regulations regarding foreign investment partnerships.

Since you mentioned being a silent partner, I presume this would mean that I would be taking the lead on the daily operations of the investment. Correct me if I have misunderstood your terms. 

I completely concur with your assessment regarding the importance of time in such matters. Hence, I suggest that we commence more secure and in-depth discussions at the earliest convenience. Voice or video communications would be more suitable for such delicate discussions, and I am available for a call at your earliest convenience. Please let me know your time zone and available time slots, so we can schedule a session accordingly.

Additionally, your offer to share government-issued identification is appreciated as it lays the groundwork for a transparent and trusting partnership. Upon verification, I will reciprocate by providing my credentials, thereby ensuring mutual confidence.

Could you please provide further details about the specific modes of transfer and management of funds you had in mind? This will assist me in conducting a preliminary assessment and in potentially engaging with legal and financial consultants here to ensure everything is set up in compliance with local laws.

Thank you once again for considering me for this venture. I am looking forward to your reply and the passport copy to take our discussions to the next stage.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Good day Sir,

I am Barrister Mesut Goker a lawyer to Mrs. Donna Berat, I wish to inform you that the LAST WILL AND TESTAMENT of Mrs. Donna Berat has been prepared in your name, attached is the scanned copy of the  WILL view it and get back to me immediately and also acknowledged the receipt of the Will to Mrs. Donna, make sure you keep them safe because it is the only evidence you have as the rightful beneficiary to the said fund.

I have sent the original copies to the bank where she deposited the money. I will be waiting for your immediate response.

Best regards.

Barrister <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, ESQ

THE LAST WILL AND TESTAMENT OF mrs. DONNa Berat WILSON
I, Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson, a resident of Manila Philippines, being of sound mind and disposing memory, do
hereby make and declare this instrument to be my last will and testament, hereby revoking any and all wills
and codicils by me at any time heretofore made.
Item I

Instruction Concerning Personal Property: Enjoyment in Specie
I anticipate that included as a part of my property and estate at the time of my death will be tangible personal
property of various kinds, characters and values, including trophies and other items accumulated by me during
my professional career in Philippines. I hereby specifically instruct all concerned that my Executor, herein
appointed, shall have complete freedom and discretion as to disposal of any and all such property so long as
he shall act in good faith and in the best interest of my estate and my beneficiaries, and his discretion so
exercised shall not be subject to question by anyone whomsoever.
I hereby expressly authorize my Executor and my Trustee, respectively and successively, to permit any
beneficiary of any and all trusts created hereunder to enjoy in specie the use or benefit of any household
goods, chattels, or other tangible personal property (exclusive of chooses in action, cash, stocks, bonds or
other securities) which either my Executor or my Trustees may receive in kind, and my Executor and my
Trustees shall not be liable for any consumption, damage, injury to or loss of any tangible property so used,
nor shall the beneficiaries of any trusts hereunder or their executors of administrators be liable for any
consumption, damage, injury to or loss of any tangible personal property so used.

Item II
Residuary Trust

(a) I hereby willed the sum of $10,250,000.00usd deposited in BDO Chartered Bank Philippines to Mr.
Cameron McCaffrey of USA as directed by the spirit of God in me for his humanitarian activities
and help to the less privileged. I further declare that money cannot be deducted from this inheritance
sum by any individual, group or agency until it gets to the beneficiaries who shall exert full control
over the money in its entirety.
(b) The Trustees is directed to take, hold, manage, invest and reinvent the corpus of the trust and to
collect the income therefore in accordance with the rights, powers, duties, authority and discretion
hereinafter set forth.
(c) After payment of all costs incurred in the management of the trust estate, the Trustee is authorized to
accumulate the net income or to pay or apply so much of the net income and such portion of the
principal at any time and from time to time for health, education, support, comfortable maintenance
and welfare of orphanage homes. Any decision of the Trustee as to whether or not distribution to any
of the persons described hereunder shall be final and conclusive and not subject to question by any
legatee or beneficiary hereunder.

Item III
Executor and Trustee
I appoint as executor of this, my last will and testament, and as Trustee of every trust required to be created
hereunder, my attorney, Barrister Mesut Goker Esq. of Supreme Court Manila Philippines. I hereby direct that
my said attorney shall be entitled by his last will and testament, duly probated, to appoint a successor
Executor of my estate, as well as a successor Trustee or successor Trustees of all the trusts to be created under
my last will and testament.

Item IV

Concerning the Trustee and the Executor

2

(a) My Trustee (as well as my Executor) shall be entitled to reasonable and adequate compensation for
the fiduciary services rendered by him.
(b) My Executor and his successor Executor and his successor Executor shall have the same rights,
privileges, powers and immunities herein granted to my Trustee wherever appropriate.

In WITNESS WHEREOF, I, the said Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson, do hereunto set my hand and seal in the presence
of two (2) competent witnesses, in which one of them is my Attorney Mesut Goker and in their presence do
publish and declare this instrument to be my Last Will and Testament, this day 19th of February 2024.

______________________
[Signed by Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson]

The foregoing instrument, consisting of this and two (2) preceding typewritten pages, was signed, sealed and
declared by Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson, the Testator, to be her Last Will and Testament, in our presence, and
we, at her request and in her presence and in the presence of each other, have hereunto subscribed our
names as witnesses, this day 19th of February 2024.

__________________
[Signed by Ginger Alden]

__________________
[Signed by Barbra P. Hodge]

In our presence, the undersigned, who at her request and in her sight and presence, and in the sight and
presence of each other, have subscribed our names as attesting witnesses on this day 19th of February 2024,
And we further make oath or affirm that the Testator was of sound mind and disposing memory and not acting
under fraud, menace or undue influence of any person, and was more than eighteen (18) years of age and that
each of the attesting witnesses is more than eighteen (18) years of age.
Sworn To and Subscribed before me on this day 19th of February 2024.

________________
Barrister Mesut Goker (Esq)
(Supreme Court Manila)

Cameron McCaffrey
